applicability_notes: Accurate (non-approximated) sigmoid variant; golden maps sigmoid_accurate -> torch.sigmoid. Unit test validates with ULP tolerance of 3 (allow_nonfinite=True) using fast_and_approximate_mode=False. Fusable as a unary epilogue/activation in op chains.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.sigmoid_accurate(tt_in, fast_and_approximate_mode=False)
